# Bistro Saimaa

Bistro Saimaa is a full-service restaurant in Ristiina, Mikkeli, Finland. Located near the shores of Lake Saimaa, the restaurant serves à la carte meals, a weekly changing lunch, and offers catering and event room services across the Southern Savonia region.

## Location

- Address: Brahentie 42, 52300 Ristiina, Finland
- Coordinates: 61.5067° N, 27.2586° E
- About 20 minutes' drive from Mikkeli city centre

## Contact

- Phone: +358 50 4499 322
- Email: bistrosaimaa@gmail.com
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/bistrosaimaaoy

## Opening Hours

- Monday–Friday: 07:00–20:00
- Saturday: 09:00–20:00
- Sunday: 11:00–20:00

## Services

- **À la carte restaurant** — burgers, pizzas, steaks, salads, grill dishes, children's menu, vegetarian menu
- **Weekly lunch** — changing menu served Monday–Friday 10:30–14:00, price €13.50; posted weekly on Facebook
- **Catering** — buffets, coffee service, and tailored menus for events and celebrations throughout Southern Savonia
- **Event rooms (kabinetti)** — private event and sauna facilities on-site for gatherings and celebrations

## Menu Highlights (à la carte, prices include VAT)

Burgers from €5.00 — Hamburger, Cheeseburger, Devil's Burger, Bacon Burger, Bluecheese Burger, Chicken Burger, Goat Cheese Burger, Double Cheese Burger, Lumberjack, Astuvan Akke, Astuvan Ukko, Saimaan Open Burger

Pizzas (large) from €13.00 — Basic, BBQ Chicken, Metti, Four Cheeses, Tomalo-Mozzarella, Burger Pizza, Devil's Chicken. Build-your-own option with 1–4 toppings €11–€14.

À la carte mains €12.90–€16.90 — Grilled Chicken Steak, Breaded Pork Steak, Grilled Devil's Chicken, Beef's Leaf Steak, Hunter's Bread, Houses Bread

Salads €11.50–€13.50 — Greek Salad, Salad with Chicken, Salad with Tuna, Salad with Chicken and Bacon, Salad with Goat Cheese

From the Grill €3.50–€14.90 — Fries with Sausage, Saimaa's Makkis-Pekkis, Chicken Basket, Dip Basket, Garlic Delicacy, Delicious Grill Plate, Loaded Fries, French Fries, Mozzarella Sticks, Onion Rings, Chicken Fingers

Children's menu €3.50–€8.50 — Fries with Sausage, Kanakori, Dippikori, Children's Pizza, Burger Meal, Dip Vegetables

Vegetarian/vegan €3.50–€12.00 — Vegan Basket with Frankfurters, Vegan Nugget Basket, Delicious Basket, Dip Vegetables, Vegan Cheese Pizza, Vegan Burger, Goat Cheese Burger
